title: How To Design a Complete Brand Identity With AI (Best AI Logo Maker)
summary: Design.com is an AI platform for generating complete brand identities including logos, brand kits, business cards, and social media templates. Users input plain-English descriptions and edit outputs through conversational interface. The tool auto-applies brand styling across 500,000+ templates without manual re-coloring.
writeup: The video walks through Design.com, an AI platform that generates complete brand identities from plain-English descriptions, covering logos, brand kits, business cards, and social media templates. It demonstrates a conversational editing interface where outputs are refined through natural language rather than manual tools. The key takeaway is that brand styling auto-applies across a library of 500,000+ templates without manual re-coloring, and the platform supports animated logos.
